steps.title: Spot the example setup
steps.content: The first sentence says the station serves its community in several ways. The next sentence names specific services: local news, music, and Umatilla-language programming.

steps.title: Reject contrast and result transitions
steps.content: B would signal a result, but the programming is an example of service, not a consequence of it. C signals a final outcome, and D signals contrast; neither relationship fits. The answer is A.
